priority_basis: R-017 made replay acceptance structurally fail-closed but did not distinguish complete observation from threshold-filtered absence.
action: Add a standards-linked coverage gate that prevents missing Event Timing entries from being interpreted as no interactions or good responsiveness.

progress.finding: Buffered entries omit durations below 104 ms and live thresholds cannot be lower than 16 ms, so entry absence is normally partial evidence.

handoff: Vercel Studio should evaluate coverage before replay interpretation and retain partial rather than success when entries may have been hidden by thresholding or late observer installation.
limits: No deployed integration invokes this gate.
No physical iPhone Safari packet was evaluated.
The primary specification is a Working Draft.
Coverage classification does not prove causality, visual divergence, responsiveness quality, or complete event delivery.
next_action: Compose the R-018 coverage result into the R-017 replay acceptance boundary and add physical-browser fixtures for early observer, late observer, buffered retrieval, and zero-interaction navigation cases.
